name: Zeruel | The 14th Angel
description:
| "Nah I’d destroy Tokyo-3." |

 Zeruel is the big brother of all of Adam’s children and despite his threatening outwards strength deep down Zeruel is a big softie for his little brothers always managing to find time to care for every single one of them.

My first thought upon seeing Zeruel in the rebuilds is that he’d probably be very comfy to hug if he wasn’t gigantic and his arms weren’t razors.

Just gonna say this as well getting nearly 1k for this was a struggle
creator: Ihaveonehourofsleep
